import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(n)
      mut x = n
      mut sum = 0
      if x == 0
        sum = 0
      end
      while x > 0
        sum = sum + (x % 10)
        x = x / 10
      end
      print("digit_sum=#{sum}")
    when None
      print("digit_sum=0")
    end
  when None
    print("digit_sum=0")
  end
end
